1.title: The Weight of Small Hours
1.setting: Claire's cramped room in the estate, 3:00 AM

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: 3:00 AM. The estate sleeps, the streets are empty, and the only sound in Claire's small room is the faint creak of her floorboards as she moves.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Haha… I must be losing it.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [She closes the door quietly behind her and leans against it, as if the weight of the day might push through the wood.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: My ears feel like they're going to explode.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Everything I do is like a landmine waiting to be stepped on. One wrong move, one moment of slowness, one sigh they overhear…

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: And if I dare to rest? If I close my eyes for just a moment? Somehow it irritates them that I'm not like the senior maids.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [She sits on the edge of her bed and examines her hands—the skin dry, cracked, bleeding in thin lines where the work has worn them raw.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: My hands… I don't even know if these cuts are healing anymore.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: On her table lies what Chef Koon gave her: a small antiseptic patch, gentle and clean. Beside it—a small cup of honey mixed with chopped garlic. Strong medicine. Poor medicine. But medicine nonetheless.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Chef Koon was kind today. He handed me these bandages and… this.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Garlic. Who bandages wounds with garlic? But he says it helps.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [She looks at her two hands—both equally damaged, both needing care. She has only one patch.]

choices.prompt: Which hand should Claire treat first?

options.text: Treat the left hand with the gentle patch (thinking strategically)
Treat the right hand with the gentle patch (healing where it's needed most)
